message:
Expand test coverage for serve.ts and doctor.ts CLI commands

- serve.ts: 79.58% → 80.88% line coverage
  - Added serveCommand validation tests (port, host, auth token)
  - Added memory_reflect validation tests (workspace, session params)
  - Added cm_context workspace validation and valid request tests
  - Added cm_feedback empty reason/session validation tests
  - Added serveCommand host validation tests

- doctor.ts: 81.94% → 83.32% line coverage
  - Added repo-level .cass structure tests (partial/complete setup)
  - Added trauma system database check tests
  - Added sanitization pattern disabled check tests

90 tests passing across both test files. Overall: 85.60% funcs, 84.96% lines.

Related: cass_memory_system-sdt1.4.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
